narrative:
Cheshire Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 562 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
